query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A person wearing thin metal-framed glasses and a white button-down shirt appears twice against a solid blue background. On the right side, the person faces forward with a neutral expression. On the left side, the same person appears with their mouth open in a wide shout or laugh, creating a layered effect where both versions overlap.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A double exposure photograph shows a person wearing thin metal-framed glasses and a white button-down shirt duplicated against a solid blue background. The left version is motion-blurred with an open mouth in a wide shout or laugh, overlapping and ghosting into the right version where the same person faces forward with a calm, neutral expression, creating a layered, unsettling juxtaposition of emotional extremes.
